name: April
description: A woman who supports November 11. Her power creates hurricanes which result in downpours, coating everything in water so that November 11 can freeze it. Her remuneration is to drink beer. In contrast to November 11, she very much enjoys her remuneration due to her love for alcohol. (Source: Wikipedia)   ~!In Ryuusei no Gemini, Hei kills April when she attempts to suffocate him with water.!~
